title: echinops macrophyllus var. macrophyllus
intro: Echinops macrophyllus var. macrophyllus, a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of China, is a subspecies of the globe thistle. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Echinops macrophyllus var. macrophyllus include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
